problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
